hotels.title: Our Hotels
hotels.subtitle: Discover our properties in the Thuringian Forest – comfortable, close to nature and with heartfelt hospitality.
rooms.title: Our Best Rooms
rooms.intro: We offer you an unforgettable experience in our exclusive hotel – combining comfort and design. Relax in modern rooms.
rooms.emptyText: As soon as room data is available, it will appear here automatically from the API.
team.heading: Our Team
team.subtitle: Meet the people who make your stay special.
themes.title: Holiday Themes
themes.description: Looking to leave everyday stress behind and relax in the Thuringian Forest? As a fan of fresh air and exercise, you value unspoilt nature and varied activities? Find your holiday theme – we take care of the rest.
offers.title: Information About Offers
offers.subtitle: Packages and seasonal offers we have selected for you. Check the details on each card.
videoPromo.title: Watch our promotional video
videoPromo.subtitle: A short look at the atmosphere, nature and experiences at Werrapark Resort.
about.heroSubtitle: In the heart of the Thuringian Forest, we offer a nature-connected, guest-oriented experience.
about.missionText: To provide our guests with a calm, warm and safe environment and to strengthen sustainable tourism by preserving local culture and nature.
about.missionPoint3: Cooperation with regional businesses and local producers
about.valuesHospitalityText: Every guest is welcomed with genuine warmth.
about.valuesQualityText: Perfection in detail: hygiene, comfort and pleasure.
about.valuesSustainabilityText: Energy and water efficiency, waste management, local sourcing.
about.timeline2Text: New rooms and wellness area added.
about.timeline3Text: Switch to online booking and modern CRM.
about.timeline4Text: Solar energy and waste reduction programs.
about.ctaTitle: We look forward to welcoming you
about.ctaText: If you have questions, contact us – our team is happy to help.
offerDetail.intro: Discover the details of this offer and combine nature, comfort and culinary highlights in the Thuringian Forest.
offerDetail.service1: Accommodation in the selected Werrapark hotel
offerDetail.service2: Rich breakfast buffet with regional products
offerDetail.service3: Free use of pool and sauna area (depending on hotel)
offerDetail.service4: Various leisure activities in the Thuringian Forest
offerDetail.priceText: Send us your preferred travel dates and we will check availability and create an individual offer.
roomDetail.bookingText: Would you like to book this room? Send us your preferred dates and we will get back to you with a suitable offer.
roomDetail.priceFallback: Price details will be added soon. Contact us for an individual offer.
hotelDetail.requestText: Interested in this hotel? Get in touch and we'll advise you on availability, room types and offers.
reviews.title: What our guests say about us
reviews.subtitle: Real voices from Werrapark Resort - open, warm and straight from the stay experience.
contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: You can reach us through any channel you prefer. We look forward to hearing from you.
contact.mapText: An interactive map with API data will be integrated here later.
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Thank you! Your message has been sent successfully.
contact.error: There was an error sending your message. Please try again later.
contact.validationEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
map.title: Werrapark Resort - In the heart of Germany
map.subtitle: Discover us in the heart of the Thuringian Forest, surrounded by untouched nature.
giftVoucher.heroSubtitle: Choose the right payment method and create your voucher in just a few steps.
giftVoucher.introText: Whether it is a wellness break, a short stay or simply a special surprise: the Werrapark voucher turns it into a memorable experience.
giftVoucher.brandText: The voucher is tailored to Werrapark and can later be connected directly to your payment providers.
giftVoucher.methodsSubtitle: Stripe, PayPal and SEPA are available individually depending on your panel configuration.
giftVoucher.methodStripeDesc: Card, Apple Pay or Google Pay via Stripe.
giftVoucher.methodPaypalDesc: Quick checkout with your PayPal account.
giftVoucher.methodSepaDesc: Classic direct debit for bank transfer authorization.
giftVoucher.notActivated: Currently not enabled in the panel
giftVoucher.invoiceHint: The invoice is shown after a successful payment, not on this overview page.
giftVoucher.apiFallback: Response is invalid or unreachable. Please verify BILLING and tenant settings.
giftVoucher.checkoutSubtitle: Choose an amount or define your own voucher value.
giftVoucher.chooseAmountHint: Select a fixed voucher value or enter your own amount.
giftVoucher.cardSubtitle: A refined gift card for stays, culinary moments and relaxing escapes in the Thuringian Forest.
giftVoucher.recipientHint: These details can later appear on the voucher or in the order overview.
giftVoucher.messagePlaceholder: Wishing you a peaceful and joyful getaway!
giftVoucher.summaryHint: Review amount, quantity and payment type before the next step.
giftVoucher.stripePublicAvailable: A public Stripe key is already available in the panel.
giftVoucher.stripeUnavailableNote: Stripe is not fully configured in the panel yet.
giftVoucher.stripeIntegrationNote: The actual payment can later be connected with Stripe.js or the Payment Element. The invoice appears after successful payment.
giftVoucher.paypalClientAvailable: A client ID is already stored in the panel.
giftVoucher.paypalUnavailableNote: PayPal is not fully configured in the panel yet.
giftVoucher.paypalIntegrationNote: PayPal Smart Buttons can be integrated here later. The invoice appears after successful payment.
giftVoucher.sepaUnavailableNote: SEPA is not fully configured in the panel yet.
giftVoucher.sepaIntegrationNote: Mandate data and direct debit can later be connected with your payment provider. The invoice appears after successful payment.
giftVoucher.paymentUnavailable: This payment method is currently unavailable
giftVoucher.validationEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
giftVoucher.submitError: An error occurred while creating the invoice.
giftVoucher.invoiceCreatedSuccess: The invoice was created successfully and sent to the panel.
giftVoucher.invoiceRedirectError: The invoice was created, but the invoice page could not be opened.
giftVoucher.invoicePageSubtitle: The purchase is complete. You can review the created invoice summary below.
giftVoucher.invoiceNotFoundText: This invoice record cannot be displayed right now.
giftVoucherPromo.title: Give the gift of relaxation with Werrapark vouchers
giftVoucherPromo.description: Available digitally within seconds or as a stylish voucher card. Flexible to redeem and ideal for birthdays, anniversaries and special moments at Werrapark Resort.
cookie.title: Cookie Settings
cookie.text: We use essential cookies for operation. Optional cookies enable analytics and WhatsApp communication.
whatsapp.heading: WhatsApp Support
whatsapp.text: Write to us directly – we will get back to you as soon as possible.
whatsapp.defaultMessage: Hello Werrapark Team, I would like to make an inquiry.
